name: Amish Friendship Apple Nut Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 medium apples, peeled and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease two 9-by-5-inch loaf pans.
3. In a large bowl, beat together the starter, eggs, oil, and vanilla extract.
4. Add flour, sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, baking soda, and salt; blend until smooth.
5. Fold in the nuts and apples; transfer batter to prepared loaf pans.
6. Bake for 50 minutes. Remove from oven and allow loaves to cool in pans for 10 minutes.
7. Turn off heat and carefully tip out onto a rack to finish cooling completely.
Note: To make 24 muffins, spoon batter into greased muffin tins and bake for 25 to 30 minutes.
